task_completion.description: Agent opens the 'New Screen Overlay' dialog within the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'New Screen Overlay' (or similar Google Earth interface) is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the name 'Compass Legend' for the overlay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the dialog contains the text 'Compass Legend'.

task_completion.description: Agent inputs the correct Wikimedia URL for the compass image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Link' or 'Image' field shows the URL 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1a/Brosen_windrose.svg/240px-Brosen_windrose.svg.png'.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the Screen XY coordinates to X: 0.95 and Y: 0.05.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the position/location settings (often under a 'Screen' tab), the 'Screen XY' values are set to x=0.95 and y=0.05.

task_completion.description: The compass rose image appears in the bottom-right corner of the map view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A compass rose image is visible overlaying the map near the bottom-right corner of the viewport.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the overlay as a KML file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save Place As' dialog is visible with the filename 'compass_overlay.kml' and the directory path '/home/ga/Documents'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the application's native dialogs to create the overlay.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the 'New Screen Overlay' dialog window, not a text editor or code interface.

integrity.description: Agent does not create the KML file using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of terminal commands like 'echo', 'cat', or scripts generating the .kml file directly.

integrity.description: Agent manually enters or pastes the URL into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL is visible inside the application's input field, confirming interaction with the software's configuration menu.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required overlay name is 'Compass Legend'. The image URL is 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1a/Brosen_windrose.svg/240px-Brosen_windrose.svg.png'. The required position coordinates are Screen X: 0.95 and Screen Y: 0.05.
